chosen_action.title: Surface Apollo runtime-blocker follow-through on the execution board

why_this_action.summary: The board was still collapsing a due Apollo follow-up into the same empty-board guard state even though the highest-leverage next step was a blocker-specific follow-through. This repair turns that auth-blocked due review into a truthful reusable packet instead of another duplicate guard pause.
targets_prepared: Ralph Workflow curator follow-up — Codeberg CTA

result.summary: The execution board now carries a do-now Apollo runtime-blocker review packet when follow-up is due, keeping the Codeberg-primary outbound lane warm without pretending the auth-blocked runtime is already live.
